p2p_enrichment.notes:
Added CI/CD commands from uv repo as pass_to_pass gates:
1. test_uv_keyring_cargo_check: cargo check -p uv-keyring
2. test_uv_keyring_cargo_clippy: cargo clippy -p uv-keyring --all-targets --all-features
3. test_cargo_fmt_check: cargo fmt --all --check
4. test_uv_keyring_mock_tests: cargo test -p uv-keyring --lib mock --features native-auth
5. test_cargo_check_locked: cargo check --locked -p uv-keyring
6. test_cargo_toml_valid: TOML validation for workspace Cargo.toml
7. test_uv_keyring_cargo_toml_valid: TOML validation for uv-keyring/Cargo.toml (NEW - tests the modified file)
8. test_cargo_lock_valid: TOML validation for Cargo.lock
9. test_readme_exists_with_docs: README.md exists with documentation

All 9 p2p tests verified passing on base commit 84a854c169ef8acdcc90692e40f6f540be74b956
